arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan (Champions League)
arts.sum: A guess at Bayern Munich ’s starting XI, which is a tough ask given all of the injuries. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch and more!
arts.sum: For the first time in history, Bayern Munich and Inter Milan will clash in the Champions League quarterfinal stage. Inter finished fourth in the Champions League group stage then defeated Feyenoord twice in the Round of 16.

arts.ttl: Kompany: Total 'faith' in fit Bayern stars vs. Inter
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be missing several key players in Tuesday's Champions League quarterfinal first leg clash at home to Inter Milan, but manager Vincent Kompany has complete faith in those that are available.
